title: Boots Craft (Deflection + Movement Speed + Hybrid)
goal: Exceptional ev/es 2-socket boots with T1/T2 deflection, full suffix line including resistance and movement speed, and hybrid ev/es prefixes.

baseRequirements.hint: ev/es hybrid base is the target. Skip pure-armour or pure-ES exceptional bases for this craft.

steps.title: Make rare → annul to 1 mod → chaos spam for T1/T2 deflection
steps.description: Make the boots rare, annul down to a single mod. Chaos spam looking for T1 or T2 deflection rating prefix.

steps.title: Sinistral Exalt → land a prefix
steps.description: Omen of Sinistral Exaltation + Exalted Orb to fill a prefix slot.

steps.title: Sinistral Crystallise + Essence of Horror
steps.description: Omen of Sinistral Crystallisation + Essence of Horror — consumes the prefix you just slammed and substitutes T1 Attack Speed.

steps.title: Dextral Necromancy + Preserved Rib + Echoes → resistance suffix
steps.description: Stack Omen of Dextral Necromancy + Preserved Rib. Use Abyssal Echoes for reroll. You want any resistance suffix here.

steps.title: Exalt → Sinistral Crystallise + Essence of Hysteria for MS
steps.description: Plain Exalted Orb to fill another prefix slot. Then Sinistral Crystallisation + Essence of Hysteria — consumes that prefix and substitutes Movement Speed.

steps.title: Homogenising + Greater Exalt + Perfect Exalt → finish double hybrid
steps.description:
Final slam: Omen of Homogenising Exaltation + Omen of Greater Exaltation + Perfect Exalted Orb. 100% chance to hit double hybrid evasion/es on the remaining prefix slots.

Boots done — T1/T2 deflection, T1 attack speed (carried over), movement speed, resistance, and double hybrid.

pricingTips: T1/T2 deflection rating is the headline — lead with it.
Movement speed is THE filter people use. Match the MS roll to your asking price tier.
notes: This craft is simpler than gloves — fewer brick points, more linear progression.
If you're skipping step 4 (don't need MS), just exalt a prefix and let it land however.
